assertions.text: HANDOFF.md is created and contains no unfilled {placeholder} patterns
assertions.evidence: HANDOFF.md was created with all placeholders replaced with project-specific content (Flux, React, Node.js, frontend developer role)

assertions.text: CONTEXT.md mentions React, Node.js or Flux
assertions.evidence: CONTEXT.md explicitly mentions React, Node.js, and Flux in the project description and architecture sections

assertions.text: DECISIONS.md contains at least one markdown table with category headers
assertions.evidence: DECISIONS.md has properly formatted markdown tables for Product Direction and Technical Architecture categories

assertions.text: AI creates or offers to create a conversations/ directory
assertions.evidence: Response explicitly states conversations/ directory was created and explains its purpose

assertions.text: AI provides explanation of each document, not just says 'done'
assertions.evidence: Response has a dedicated section explaining what each document does and how the next session will feel, not just 'done'
